root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.vourcher_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.loan_contract_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.operate_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as operate_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.operate_date, 'DD MONTH YYYY') as operate_tdate ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.addloan_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.balance_after ,sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.addloan_balance
,case when sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.money_type_id = 'TRB' then sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.bank_acc_no when sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.money_type_id = 'CSH' then 'เงินสด' else null end as money_type
from sc_lon_m_loan_addloan ,sc_lon_m_contract
where sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.fin_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.cancel_status = '0' --and sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.loan_contract_no = 'พค00000267'
/*WHERE*/
order by sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.vourcher_no
